CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL. PL. WIT, MARIA P. SERAFINO, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, LEASE AGREEMENT, ID & INTO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1200 CORTLAND, #1, S.F, CA. - FORF. OF LEASE AGREEMENT - COSTS WVD. - $1,329.86 RENT & DAMAGES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUSIC, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1200 CORTLAND AVE, #1, S.F, CA. $1,329.86 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,329.86, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS WVD.
